title: Palantir and Anthropic AI helped the US hit 1k Iran targets in 24 hours
full_text:
How Palantir and Anthropic AI helped the US hit 1,000 Iran targets in 24 hours

US military used Palantir’s Maven AI system with Anthropic’s Claude to generate and prioritise targets during Iran strikes. 

 

 

 March 06, 2026 / 19:37 IST 

 

 Pentagon relied on Palantir’s Maven system paired with Anthropic’s Claude AI to generate and prioritise targets during Iran operations. 

US military used AI to strike 1,000 targets in Iran in 24 hours
Maven system, powered by Claude AI, accelerated military planning
Pentagon to phase out Anthropic's AI tools after policy dispute
